public_s3_bucket.reason: S3 buckets should never have public read or write ACLs. This is a massive data leak risk.

open_ingress_sg.reason: Security group allows ingress from any IP address (0.0.0.0/0). Enforce Least Privilege.

privileged_pod.reason: Running a privileged pod gives it root capabilities on the host node. This allows container escapes.

root_user.reason: Running a pod as user 0 (root) allows container escapes. Use a non-root user ID.
